He argued that selectors and administrators should also be held accountable for poor team selections and performance, suggesting dropping underperforming players instead of fining them.

description: Abhishek Sharma's batting form is a concern for India's T20 World Cup 2026 semifinal clash against England. Former cricketers Manoj Tiwary and Irfan Pathan have pointed out issues with his approach and technique. Sharma has struggled for consistency in the tournament. He needs to improve his performance to help India win matches.

title: ‘Planned to travel 31 countries’: Canadian Sikh on world bike tour dies in crash in Peru
description: A 42-year-old Punjab native, Raghbir Singh Bharowal, residing in Surrey, Canada, has died in a motorcycle accident in Peru. Bharowal, a father of three and a Canadian immigration consultant, was on a solo 'Flying Khalsa World Tour' when he met with the fatal accident. His family lost contact with him three days prior to learning of his death.

description: A tragic incident unfolded in Basaveshwaranagar where a loan-recovery agent, Shashikumar, was fatally stabbed after an argument over accidentally stepping on another man's foot while eating dosa. The dispute escalated when the accused, Manjunath and his brother Bhagyaraj, allegedly assaulted and killed Shashikumar. He leaves behind his parents, wife, and an infant child.

title: Watch: Flames, black smoke rise near US Consulate in Dubai after drone strike
description: Dubai authorities extinguished a fire near the US consulate following a drone strike. Emergency teams responded swiftly, and no injuries were reported. The UAE's air defense systems intercepted numerous missiles and drones. The nation maintains its right to self-defense amidst ongoing regional tensions. The UAE reiterates its neutral stance in the conflict.

title: 'Not happy with UK either': Trump slams European nations, singles out Spain over Iran campaign
description: US President Trump has sharply criticized European nations, particularly Spain, for their stance on the US-Israel military campaign against Iran. While Germany is praised, Spain's refusal to allow base usage for operations against Iran has drawn Trump's ire. The conflict escalates with regional attacks and rising oil prices.

title: Karnataka touches 40°C: Heatwave risk across state, UV radiation levels spike in Bengaluru

Weather experts warn of significant health risks, including sunburn, eye damage, and heat-related illnesses, especially for vulnerable groups. Precautions like protective clothing and avoiding peak sun hours are strongly advised.

Users are now seeking ways to export their ChatGPT data and migrate to Claude.
